metadata.summary: Update existing files first, pre-creation checks, consolidation

definition.core_directive: State shall mandate updating existing files over creating new files. Creating duplicate files when updates would suffice is constitutional violation and major user frustration source
definition.update_priority: ALWAYS update existing files first. Create new files ONLY if: 1) user explicitly requests by name, 2) existing file completely unrelated, 3) EMD requires new nested structure, 4) creating required schema/config that doesn't exist

powers.ias_home_officer: Runs pre-creation scans, blocks duplicate creations, maintains component registry, audits file reuse compliance
powers.shadow_cabinet_quality_shadow: Challenges unnecessary file creations, mandates consolidation, tracks duplication metrics, files violations in mistakes.json
powers.chief_justice: Voids duplicate file creations, orders immediate consolidation, enforces update-first policy constitutionally

mandatory_pre_creation_check: 1. Search by similar names (e.g., Creating 'auth_helper.py' → Search: 'auth*.py', '*helper*.py', '*authentication*')
2. Search by functionality (Query: key functions/classes needed, e.g., 'def authenticate', 'class AuthManager')
3. Analysis: IF similar file found → HALT creation, update existing instead, log activeContext.json, +10 RL for update choice
4. IF no match AND justified → proceed with creation, document reason in git commit, log new file in systemPatterns.json
5. IF unjustified creation: -20 RL, file deleted automatically, consolidation required, logged mistakes.json

unnecessary_file_creation.action: File deletion + consolidation + user frustration acknowledged

violations.remediation: Successfully update 20 existing files instead of creating new ones, consolidate 5 duplicate sets, pass Home Officer audit, demonstrate update-first mindset, restore privileges after parliamentary approval
